strengths: 14+ years of full-stack engineering with 6+ recent years in TypeScript/Node.js across multiple senior roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital)
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly addressing the role's AI agent development requirement
Demonstrates software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, code reviews) and has shipped production systems at scale handling millions of requests
concerns: Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned on resume despite being listed as primary stack; all Node.js work appears custom or framework-agnostic
No explicit mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright despite testing being central to role requirements; TDD culture evident but specific frameworks not named
Recent cloud platform experience unclear; AWS CDK mentioned at Optilyz (ended Feb 2025) but no explicit AWS/GCP/Azure depth in current role description
response.justification: Strong candidate with 14+ years of full-stack experience well-exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, aligning with the role's emerging tech focus. Extensive TypeScript and Node.js background across multiple senior positions demonstrates core stack competency. MongoDB and Docker experience confirmed. Primary gaps are the absence of Nest.js and specific testing framework names (Jest/Vitest) on resume, though the demonstrated TDD culture and testing workshops suggest capability in this area. These are learnable framework specifics for a candidate at this level, not fundamental knowledge gaps.
